data.body:
Goal:
Make the release script resilient to active main branch movement by syncing and validating the target branch before any version bump, commit, tag, push, or GitHub release mutation.

Verification:
1. bun run lint passes.
2. bunx tsc --noEmit passes.
3. bun run test passes.
4. bun run build passes.
5. A dry-run release from a branch behind its upstream refuses to mutate and prints a clear remediation.

Constraints:
Do not introduce a PR workflow. Preserve existing release CLI flags and artifact waiting behavior.
data.title: Harden release sync
